reasoning: The control AC-4(24) focuses on ensuring secure information flow through internal normalized formats, which in cloud environments often translates to enforcing secure transport protocols like TLS. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network communications are encrypted using TLS, both at the ingress level and within the service mesh. NetworkPolicies can enforce TLS for internal communications, while Ingress resources should have TLS enabled for external communications. Additionally, service meshes like Istio can enforce mTLS for service-to-service communication. The API server should also have secure transport enabled to ensure encrypted communication.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | internal normalized format when transferring info
